title: Unofficial Reimagined Trinkets Patch
description: Small Trinkets patch for the Reimagined Resource Pack by Reijvi.
body:
A small compatibility patch containing a texture for the inventory of the [Reimagined Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) by Reijvi

I made a dark and light version! Make sure you put this above the main resource pack.

Note: The dark version only has textures for the base trinkets slots, any new slots added by other mods are not affected.
